rules: Do not hard-code user-facing strings in UI or backend notifications.
Use t("module.key") for interface copy and locale templates for push/email/SMS/PDF.
If text inside graphics is unavoidable, place it under assets/localized/{lang}/ and record it in the localized asset manifest.
UI layouts must tolerate long translations and must not rely on fixed Russian string lengths.
date_time_currency: Use locale-aware formatting for dates, time, numbers, currencies, time zones and measurement units.
